retry_reason: The function is a destructor-style put wrapper that unconditionally releases references and frees memory; there is no failure path that could be retried.
contract_summary: This function performs a batch release of all map references stored in the maps_by_name array, then frees the array and marks it as unsorted. It is called during destruction or when rebuilding the maps_by_name structure. After this call, the maps_by_name pointer is set to NULL and must not be accessed. The caller is responsible for ensuring no other concurrent access occurs. This is a cleanup operation that consumes the references; the caller must not attempt to use the released objects or the array afterwards.
